title: Make It Real Trust Policy Artifact
description: Schema for trust-policy.json, the execution policy that constrains Make It Real board runners.

schemaVersion.description: Artifact schema version emitted by the Make It Real planner.

runnerMode.description: Runner implementation authorized by this policy.

realAgentLaunch.description: Whether the runner may launch real coding agents.

approvalPolicy.description: Approval policy used for runner-side command execution.

sandbox.description: Filesystem or workspace boundary enforced by the runner.

commandExecution.description: Command execution mode allowed by this policy.

userInputRequired.description: Behavior when runner execution would require interactive user input.

unsupportedToolCall.description: Behavior when a runner attempts an unsupported tool call.

source.description: Planner or command source that wrote the trust policy.

runId.description: Run packet identifier this trust policy applies to.
